figures.caption: Figure 1: Runtime and iteration comparison between HV and ADMM for oversampled DCT sensing matrices.
Figure 2: Runtime and iteration comparison between HV and ADMM for Gaussian sensing matrices.
Table 1: Comparison of final objective values between HV and ADMM for oversampled DCT sensing matrices. The notation µ± σ reports the mean and standard deviation; Max RG reports the worst trial.
Table 2: Comparison of final objective values between HV and ADMM for Gaussian sensing matrices. The notation µ± σ reports the mean and standard deviation; Max RG reports the worst trial.
Table 3: Noisy recovery results for oversampled DCT sensing matrices at three SNR levels. The notation µ± σ reports the mean and sample standard deviation.

Table 4: Noisy recovery results for Gaussian sensing matrices at three SNR levels. Values are computed over 20 paired Monte Carlo trials. The notation µ± σ reports the mean and sample standard deviation.
